channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Shirley Temple: From Child Star to Diplomat and Cultural Icon
item.description: Shirley Temple (1928–2014) was one of Hollywood’s most celebrated child stars and later became a pioneering diplomat. Known for her 56 signature curls, Shirley’s mother meticulously styled her hair fo...

item.title: Renovations at State House Nairobi Trigger Public Debate on Design Changes
item.description: State House Nairobi has been making waves on social media after President William Ruto carried out renovations at the official residence. The historic building, once known for its colonial red-tiled r...

item.title: Cambridge postpones AS-level Mathematics exam after paper leak
item.description: Cambridge International Education (CIE) in Pakistan has confirmed that the AS-level Mathematics paper 52 (9709), held on May 12, was leaked ahead of the scheduled exam. Students reported that the pape...

item.title: Welsh Labour Faces Strategic Reckoning After Historic Election Defeat
item.description: The May 7 election marked an unprecedented defeat for Welsh Labour, ending over a century of dominance in the Senedd and leaving the party in opposition with only nine seats. The collapse is not merel...

item.title: White House Aides Report Friction Over Natalie Harp's Role in Managing Trump's Late-Night Truth Social Posts
item.description: According to a Wall Street Journal analysis, President Donald Trump has posted more than 8,800 times on Truth Social since returning to the White House in January 2025. This includes dozens of late-ni...

item.title: PM Modi urges citizens to prioritise wise spending rather than cutting expenses
item.description: According to reliable sources, Prime Minister Narendra Modi has emphasised that his recent appeal is not intended to reduce overall spending, but rather to encourage citizens to spend more judiciously...

item.title: 26-year-old man dies following collision with pedestrians in Arnold
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Market Place, Arnold, Nottinghamshire, in the early hours of Saturday when a Vauxhall Astra struck a group of pedestrians. Among the victims was Tyler Fairman, aged 26, w...

item.title: Thousands Affected by Floods in Khayelitsha as Emergency Relief Continues
item.description: Heavy rains have left over 5,000 homes in the Island informal settlement in Khayelitsha, Cape Town, still flooded, affecting thousands of residents. Community members have opened their homes to displa...

item.title: Quintessenz Revitalizes a 400-Year-Old Greek Ruin with Colorful Tapestries
item.description: In the small town of Kagatika on Paxos island, Greece, a 400-year-old ruin that once served as a factory has been transformed by an artistic installation created by the design duo Quintessenz. The ins...

item.title: Over 1,000 passengers remain on cruise ship amid gastrointestinal illness outbreak
item.description: Over 1,000 passengers are currently being held on the UK-operated cruise ship Ambition, docked in Bordeaux, France, following an outbreak of gastrointestinal illness that has affected 49 individuals. ...

item.title: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif to Visit China Officially from May 23 to 26
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif will undertake an official three-day visit to China starting from May 23 till May 26. This was announced by Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar while add...

item.title: President Trump begins three-day visit to China amid economic and geopolitical challenges
item.description: President Donald Trump has arrived in Beijing to commence a three-day state visit, marking the first time a sitting US President has visited China in nearly nine years. The visit comes amid heightened...

item.title: New Canadian asylum law risks impacting 2SLGBTQ+ refugee claimants who applied after one year
item.description: A new federal asylum reform, Bill C-12, passed in late March 2026, has raised concerns among 2SLGBTQ+ refugee claimants in Canada. The legislation bars individuals from making refugee claims if more t...

item.title: Trump Faces Backlash from MAGA Supporters Over Remarks on Americans' Finances
item.description: President Donald Trump recently made a statement admitting that Americans' financial situations do not influence his decision-making, sparking unusual criticism from within his own MAGA support base. ...

item.title: Senegal President Thanks William Ruto and Kenya After Successful Africa Forward Summit
item.description: Senegalese President Bassirou Diomaye Faye expressed his gratitude to President William Ruto and the Kenyan people following the successful Africa Forward Summit held in Nairobi from May 11 to 12, 202...

item.title: Key Factors Behind Nigerian Ports Authority’s Strong Performance in Q1 2026
item.description: The Nigerian Ports Authority (NPA) waka well for the first quarter of 2026, showing clear improvement for the ports sector. The major reasons for this growth na wetin NPA dey call infrastructure moder...

item.title: Angus Taylor unveils Coalition plan to link migration cap to housing completions and slash building red tape
item.description: Opposition Leader Angus Taylor has outlined a Coalition plan to tackle Australia's housing crisis in his budget-in-reply speech. The strategy focuses on reducing bureaucracy, linking net overseas migr...

item.title: U.S. Army Faces Budget Shortfalls and Training Cuts Amid Expanding Missions
item.description: The U.S. Army is confronting a significant budget shortfall estimated at up to $6 billion due to expanded missions both domestically and abroad under President Donald Trump's administration. The finan...

item.title: Tanzania Economy Shows Growth in Exports, Manufacturing, Gold, and Tourism in March 2026
item.description: During March 2026, Tanzania’s economy showed strong signs of growth in several key sectors. Exports increased by 12.8%, mainly driven by a significant 38.5% rise in gold exports. Manufacturing sector ...

item.title: Meta introduces private AI chats on WhatsApp to enhance user privacy
item.description: Meta Platforms is set to roll out a new 'incognito chat' feature for its AI assistant on WhatsApp, aimed at protecting user privacy. The company says this feature will use private processing technolog...
